title: BlueMap Player Visibility
description: Fabric mod that allows you to show/hide players on BlueMap
body:
# BlueMap Player Visibility
Fabric mod that allows you to show/hide players on BlueMap  
**Requires Fabric API and BlueMap!**
## Commands
| Command                | Usage                                   | OP Level | Permission      |
|------------------------|-----------------------------------------|----------|-----------------|
| /bmpv get              | Shows your own visibility               | 0        | bmpv.get.self   |
| /bmpv get \<player\>   | Shows the visibility of another player  | 2        | bmpv.get.other  |
| /bmpv show             | Makes yourself visible                  | 0        | bmpv.show.self  |
| /bmpv show \<players\> | Makes the specified player(s) visible   | 2        | bmpv.show.other |
| /bmpv hide             | Makes yourself invisible                | 0        | bmpv.hide.self  |
| /bmpv hide \<players\> | Makes the specified player(s) invisible | 2        | bmpv.hide.other |
